subcodes.first_line: O thou who journeyest in God, who hast migrated in His path, and who strivest in His Cause! I testify that thou hast proved faithful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ایها المسافر فی الله و المهاجر فی سبیله و المجاهد فی امره اشهد بانک وفیت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @presence of; reunion with God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
